items.name: Identification Card (ID)
items.description: Military ID card.
items.whyNeeded: Required for all in-processing and identity verification.

items.name: ID Tags (Dog Tags) with Breakaway Chain
items.description: Military dog tags with breakaway chain. Medical alert tags or bracelet if required.
items.notes: Medical Alert Tags or Bracelet if required.
items.whyNeeded: Mandatory identification worn at all times during field operations.

items.name: Duffel Bag
items.description: Green or brown military duffel bag, CIF issue only. No suitcases, no roller bags. Name and rank must be on bag. One bag will be used for unauthorized items.
items.notes: CIF issue only. No suitcases, no roller bags. Ensure name and rank are on each duffel bag. 1 will be used for unauthorized items collected at layout.
items.whyNeeded: All mandatory and authorized items must fit into 2 duffel bags and 1 rucksack.

items.name: OCP Garrison Uniform (Complete)
items.description: Full OCP garrison uniform with patches, flag, rank, name tape, service, and cover.
items.notes: Must have patches, flag, rank, name tape, service, and cover.
items.whyNeeded: Required for in-processing and garrison events.

items.name: CAP, OCP, Multicam
items.description: OCP/Multicam patrol cap. No rank, branch insignia, cat eyes, or other badges authorized.
items.notes: No rank, branch insignia, cat eyes, or other badges authorized.

items.name: Trousers, OCP, Multicam
items.description: OCP/Multicam trousers. Jungle or desert uniforms are unauthorized. See Note 1.
items.notes: Jungle or desert uniforms are UNAUTHORIZED. Crye, Patagonia, and combat uniforms with knee pad slots or additional pockets are not authorized.

items.name: Coat, OCP, Multicam
items.description: OCP/Multicam blouse (coat). Jungle or desert uniforms are unauthorized. See Note 1.
items.notes: Jungle or desert uniforms are UNAUTHORIZED. Crye, Patagonia, and combat uniforms with knee pad slots or additional pockets are not authorized.

items.name: Boots
items.description: All boots IAW AR 670-1. No GORE-TEX, no Temperate Weather boots, no buckles.
items.notes: No GORE-TEX, no Temperate Weather boots, no buckles. GORE-TEX boots are grounds for relief from the course.
items.whyNeeded: Foot health is critical. Two pairs allow rotation to manage blisters.
items.selectionTips: Break in both pairs well before arriving. GORE-TEX boots are prohibited.

items.name: Drawers, Cold Weather — Level 1 Bottoms (Silkies)
items.description: Military issue Poly-Pro or Gen III level-1-bottoms. Commonly called 'Silkies'.
items.notes: Military issue Poly-Pro or Gen III only.
items.whyNeeded: Winter cold weather base layer — mandatory for all courses.

items.name: Drawers, Cold Weather — Level 2 Bottoms (Waffle Bottoms)
items.description: Military issue Poly-Pro or Gen III level-2-bottoms. Commonly called 'Waffle bottoms'.
items.notes: Military issue Poly-Pro or Gen III only.
items.whyNeeded: Winter cold weather base layer — mandatory for all courses.

items.name: Undershirt, Cold Weather — Level 1 Tops (Silkies)
items.description: Military issue Poly-Pro or Gen III level-1-tops. Commonly called 'Silkies'.
items.notes: Military issue Poly-Pro or Gen III only.
items.whyNeeded: Winter cold weather base layer — mandatory for all courses.

items.name: Undershirt, Cold Weather — Level 2 Tops (Waffle Top)
items.description: Military issue Poly-Pro or Gen III level-2-tops. Commonly called 'Waffle top'.
items.notes: Military issue Poly-Pro or Gen III only.
items.whyNeeded: Winter cold weather base layer — mandatory for all courses.

items.name: Gloves, Cold Weather (Leather with Inserts)
items.description: Leather gloves with inserts only. No GORE-TEX, no O.R. gloves.
items.notes: LEATHER GLOVES WITH INSERTS ONLY. NO GORE-TEX, O.R. GLOVES ETC.
items.whyNeeded: Required cold weather hand protection.

items.name: Watch Cap, Military Issue Micro Fleece
items.description: Military issue Micro Fleece watch cap, military colors only.
items.notes: Military issue Micro Fleece only. Military colors only.
items.whyNeeded: Required cold weather head protection.

items.name: Underwear (Cotton Only — No Spandex)
items.description: Must be cotton only. No spandex, no compression style. Bring as many as needed.
items.notes: MUST BE COTTON ONLY. NO SPANDEX (compression style). Bring as many as needed.
items.selectionTips: Spandex/compression underwear is prohibited and grounds for relief from the course.

items.name: Eyeglasses with Retainer Bands
items.description: If required — military issued. NO TINT, NO TRANSITION LENSES.
items.notes: Military issued if required. NO TINT, NO TRANSITION LENSES.

items.name: Eye Protection APEL (Clear Lens)
items.description: Army authorized APEL protective eyewear, clear lens only. Inserts if required.
items.notes: Clear Lens only. With inserts if required.
items.whyNeeded: Required for range events and field operations.
items.selectionTips: Clear lens only — no tinted lenses.

items.name: PT Uniform (Complete Set)
items.description: Jacket, Pants, Long Sleeve Shirt, Short Sleeve Shirt, and Shorts. Must be complete.
items.notes: Must include: Jacket, Pants, Long Sleeve Shirt, Short Sleeve Shirt, Shorts.
items.whyNeeded: Required for all PT events.

items.name: Running Shoes
items.description: Running shoes for PT events.
items.whyNeeded: Required for physical training and running events.

items.name: Athletic Socks
items.description: Athletic socks for PT and running shoes.

items.name: Belt, Tan Non-Elastic
items.description: Tan non-elastic belt. Rigger belts accepted.
items.notes: Rigger belts accepted.

items.name: T-Shirts, Short Sleeve
items.description: Sterile tan or OCP brown. 100% cotton only — no cotton/polyester mixes. Must be loose fitting.
items.notes: Sterile tan or OCP brown. 100% cotton only. No cotton/polyester mixes. Must be LOOSE FITTING — tight fitting shirts, Under Armour, and athletic shirts are NOT authorized.
items.selectionTips: Loose fit cotton only. Under Armour and compression shirts are prohibited.

items.name: Boot Socks
items.description: Military colors only. No sock liners, no GORE-TEX, no waterproof socks, no toe socks.
items.notes: Military colors only. No sock liners, no GORE-TEX, no waterproof socks, no toe socks.
items.selectionTips: Bring extra pairs — wet socks cause blisters and trench foot.

items.name: Whistle (Subdued Color with Lanyard)
items.description: Subdued color whistle with lanyard.
items.notes: Subdued colors only. Must have lanyard.
items.whyNeeded: Used for signaling during field operations.

items.name: Ranger Shorts ('Ranger Panties')
items.description: Military/subdued colors only, no logos. Minimum 3. Required for PT — worn nearly daily. Bring extras.
items.notes: 3 ea MINIMUM. Military/subdued colors only. No logos. Commonly called 'Ranger Panties.' Worn as part of PT uniform on a nearly daily basis. BRINGING EXTRA IS AUTHORIZED.
items.whyNeeded: Required for PT. Worn almost every day as part of the PT uniform.
items.selectionTips: Bring more than the 3 minimum. These are worn constantly. Military/subdued colors only, no logos.

items.name: Hydration System — CamelBak 70–100oz
items.description: CamelBak or equivalent hydration carrier, 70–100 oz capacity. No clips or carabiners on carrier.
items.notes: Carrier will not have clips or carabiners attached.
items.whyNeeded: Essential hydration during long land navigation events and PT.
items.selectionTips: 70–100 oz capacity. Remove any clips or carabiners from the carrier.

items.name: Headlamp (Red/White Lens, AA/AAA Batteries)
items.description: Headlamp with red and white lens capability. Must require AA or AAA batteries.
items.notes: Must have red and white lens capability. Must use AA or AAA batteries.
items.whyNeeded: Required for night land navigation and early morning movement.
items.selectionTips: AA/AAA only — no rechargeable-only models. Two headlamps required in case one fails.

items.name: Batteries, AA/AAA (Headlamp — 12 Minimum)
items.description: AA or AAA batteries for headlamp. Minimum 12. Bring enough to conduct 3 full days of land navigation.
items.notes: X12 MINIMUM. Must bring enough batteries to conduct 3 days of Land Nav.
items.whyNeeded: Land navigation nights are long. Batteries run out faster in cold weather.
items.selectionTips: Bring more than 12. Cold weather drains batteries quickly.

items.name: Batteries, AA (Strobe — 4 Minimum)
items.description: AA batteries for strobe light. Minimum 4.
items.notes: X4 MINIMUM. For strobe light.
items.whyNeeded: Required to power the strobe used for identification during night operations.

items.name: Gloves, Light Duty Work Type
items.description: Light duty work gloves. No GORE-TEX, subdued/military colors only. Civilian gloves authorized.
items.notes: No GORE-TEX. Subdued/military colors only. Civilian gloves authorized.

items.name: Pens
items.description: Pens for taking notes throughout the course.
items.notes: Bring as many as needed. Will be used to take notes throughout the course.
items.whyNeeded: Used for note-taking during instruction.

items.name: Pencils
items.description: Pencils required for land nav academics and the land nav course. Bring extras.
items.notes: Needed for land nav academics and land nav course. BRING EXTRA.
items.whyNeeded: Required for plotting on maps during land navigation training.
items.selectionTips: Bring more than you think you need — pencils are critical for land nav.

items.name: Notebook
items.description: Not larger than 4"x6". Sterile (blank) upon arrival. Will be thrown away at course end.
items.notes: NOT larger than 4x6 inches. Must be sterile (blank) upon arrival. No personal land navigation items, tools, or notes.
items.whyNeeded: Used for note-taking during instruction.
items.selectionTips: Blank upon arrival. Pre-written notes or land nav notes are prohibited and grounds for relief.

items.name: Razor, Shaving (Non-Electric)
items.description: Non-electric shaving razor. Electric razor only authorized for personnel with a current shaving profile.
items.notes: Non-electric required. If servicemember has a current shaving profile, an electric razor is allowed to keep facial hair trimmed to the length designated in the profile.
items.whyNeeded: Grooming standards must be maintained. Students arrive with a 'SFPC haircut' — stubble shaved with clippers and no guard.
items.selectionTips: Bring enough for the duration. Electric razor is ONLY authorized with a current shaving profile.

items.name: Razor Blades
items.description: Replacement blades for shaving razor. 1 month supply.
items.notes: 1 month supply.

items.name: Sewing Kit, Military Issue
items.description: Standard military issue sewing kit.
items.whyNeeded: Used to repair uniforms and gear during the course.

items.name: Shaving Cream
items.description: Standard shaving cream. 1 month supply.
items.notes: 1 month supply.

items.name: Shower Shoes
items.description: Flip-flops only. No heel straps. Any color.
items.notes: Flip-flops only. No heel straps.
items.whyNeeded: Required for field hygiene facilities.

items.name: Shower Soap
items.description: Shower soap. 1 month supply.
items.notes: 1 month supply.

items.name: Toothbrush
items.description: Standard toothbrush.

items.name: Toothpaste (Large Tube)
items.description: Standard toothpaste, large tube. 1 month supply.
items.notes: 1 month supply.

items.name: Shampoo (Large Bottle)
items.description: Standard shampoo, large bottle. 1 month supply.
items.notes: 1 month supply.

items.name: Towels, Large (Military/Subdued Color)
items.description: Large towels in military/subdued colors.
items.notes: Military/subdued colors only.

items.name: Laundry Soap, Liquid
items.description: Liquid laundry soap only. Small or medium bottle. No Powder/Pods. 1 month supply.
items.notes: LIQUID ONLY. Small/Medium Bottle. No Powder/Pods. 1 month supply.
items.selectionTips: Liquid only — powder and pods are not authorized.

items.name: Wristwatch
items.description: Basic wristwatch. No GPS, altimeter, pedometer, compass, or internet capability. Allowed functions: regular time, world time, alarm, timer, stopwatch only.
items.notes: NO GPS, altimeter, pedometer, compass, or internet capability. Allowed: regular time, world time, alarm, timer, stopwatch ONLY.
items.whyNeeded: Time management is critical during all events. Two watches required in case one fails.
items.selectionTips: Simple Casio G-Shock or similar. No smart features whatsoever.

items.name: Laundry Bag, Army Issue
items.description: Army issue laundry bag. Green or black from clothing and sales.
items.notes: Green or black from clothing and sales only.

items.name: Deodorant (NOT Antiperspirant)
items.description: Standard deodorant. CANNOT be antiperspirant. 1 month supply.
items.notes: CANNOT BE ANTIPERSPIRANT. Deodorant only. 1 month supply.
items.selectionTips: Check the label — must be deodorant only, not deodorant/antiperspirant combo.

items.name: Hygiene Kit Bag, Small
items.description: Small military-style hygiene/toiletry bag.
items.whyNeeded: Keeps all hygiene items organized.

items.name: Cash
items.description: At least $75, no more than $100.
items.notes: At least $75 but no more than $100.
items.whyNeeded: Required for incidental needs. There are no sheets in the barracks — bring everything you need.
items.selectionTips: Bring exactly between $75–$100.

items.name: Whey Protein Powder (100% Whey, Factory Sealed)
items.description: 100% Whey Protein Powder. Must say 'NUTRITION FACTS' on label. Must be factory sealed on arrival — if not sealed it will be confiscated.
items.notes: MUST SAY 'NUTRITION FACTS' ON LABEL. MUST BE FACTORY SEALED ON ARRIVAL. If not factory sealed, it will be confiscated. All other supplements are prohibited.
items.whyNeeded: The only supplement authorized at SFPC. All other supplements, vitamins, and energy products are prohibited.
items.selectionTips: Buy a sealed tub. Do not open it before arrival. Must display 'Nutrition Facts' not 'Supplement Facts'.

items.name: Wet Weather Top and Bottom — Non-GORE-TEX
items.description: Cold weather waterproof wet weather top and bottom set. Non-GORE-TEX version.
items.notes: Candidates will have ALL TA-50 items whether issued at Fort Bragg CIF or not.
items.whyNeeded: Required wet weather protection for field operations.

items.name: Wet Weather Top and Bottom — GORE-TEX
items.description: Cold weather waterproof wet weather top and bottom set. GORE-TEX version.
items.notes: Both GORE-TEX and Non-GORE-TEX wet weather sets are required.
items.whyNeeded: Both versions required — GORE-TEX for maximum protection, non-GORE-TEX as backup.

items.name: Gloves, Leather (White, Tan, or Black Only)
items.description: Military issue leather gloves. White, tan, or black only.
items.notes: White, Tan, or Black only.

items.name: Fighting Load Carrier (FLC) or TAPS System
items.description: CIF issue only. No aftermarket FLCs.
items.notes: CIF ISSUE ONLY. NO AFTERMARKET FLCS.
items.whyNeeded: Primary load-bearing vest used throughout field operations.
items.selectionTips: Must be CIF issue. No aftermarket FLCs are authorized.

items.name: Canteen Pouch, 1 QT
items.description: One-quart canteen pouch.

items.name: MOLLE Ruck — Frame Pack
items.description: Pack, Frame MOLLE (Component of MOLLE Ruck).
items.notes: Component of MOLLE Ruck system.
items.whyNeeded: Primary rucksack frame for load bearing during ruck marches.

items.name: MOLLE Ruck — Molded Waist Belt
items.description: Belt, Molded Waist (Component of MOLLE Ruck).
items.notes: Component of MOLLE Ruck system.

items.name: MOLLE Ruck — Shoulder Straps
items.description: Shoulder Straps (Component of MOLLE Ruck).
items.notes: Component of MOLLE Ruck system.

items.name: MOLLE Ruck — Patrol Pack (Large)
items.description: Pack, Patrol Large (Component of MOLLE Ruck).
items.notes: Component of MOLLE Ruck system.

items.name: MOLLE Ruck — Load Lifter Attachment Straps
items.description: Load Lifter Attachment Straps (Component of MOLLE Ruck).
items.notes: Component of MOLLE Ruck system.

items.name: Clothing Bag, Waterproof
items.description: Green Army issued waterproof clothing bag with black inside.
items.notes: GREEN ARMY ISSUED WITH BLACK INSIDE.
items.whyNeeded: Protects clothing from rain and water during field operations.

items.name: Poncho Liner (Woobie)
items.description: Liner, Wet Weather Poncho.
items.whyNeeded: Provides warmth when used with poncho. One of the most versatile pieces of field gear.

items.name: Sleeping Mat
items.description: Military issue sleeping mat.
items.whyNeeded: Insulation from ground during field sleep.

items.name: Poncho, Wet Weather
items.description: Military issue wet weather poncho.
items.whyNeeded: Rain protection and hasty shelter construction during field operations.

items.name: Canteen, 2 QT
items.description: Two-quart military canteen.

items.name: Canteen, 1 QT
items.description: One-quart military canteen.

items.name: Cover, 2 QT Canteen
items.description: Cover for two-quart canteen.

items.name: Canteen Cup
items.description: Military issue canteen cup.

items.name: Entrenching Tool and Cover
items.description: Military issue e-tool (folding shovel) with carrier/cover.
items.whyNeeded: Required for field operations.

items.name: Stuff Sack, Small (See Note 4)
items.description: Small stuff sack. See Note 4 — if issued new brown sleeping bag at CIF, candidate will only have one sleeping bag and one stuff sack.
items.notes: See Note 4: Winter items mandatory for all courses. If issued new brown sleeping bag at CIF, candidate will only have one sleeping bag and one stuff sack.

items.name: Sleeping Bag System (Summer + Winter + Bivy Cover — All Mandatory)
items.description: Complete sleeping bag system. Summer bag, Winter bag, and Bivy Cover are ALL mandatory for all classes. See Note 4.
items.notes: ALL THREE components mandatory for ALL classes: Summer bag, Winter bag, Bivy Cover. See Note 4: Winter items mandatory for all courses.
items.whyNeeded: Sleep system must cover all temperature ranges.
items.selectionTips: All three components required regardless of class date. If issued a new brown bag at CIF, you will only have one sleeping bag and one stuff sack.

items.name: Stuff Sack, Large (See Note 4)
items.description: Large stuff sack for sleeping bag system. See Note 4.
items.notes: See Note 4: Winter items mandatory for all courses. If issued new brown sleeping bag at CIF, candidate will only have one sleeping bag and one stuff sack.

items.name: Alcohol Eraser
items.description: Eraser for alcohol pens used on map cases.
items.notes: As needed.

items.name: Black Tape (Friction or Electrical)
items.description: Black friction or electrical tape.
items.notes: 2 rolls.

items.name: Nail Clippers
items.description: Finger and/or toe nail clippers.

items.name: Foot Powder, Non-Aerosol
items.description: Non-aerosol foot powder for blister and fungus prevention.
items.notes: Non-aerosol only.
items.whyNeeded: Helps prevent blisters and trench foot.

items.name: Large Trash Bags
items.description: Large heavy-duty trash bags.
items.notes: 1 box.

items.name: Lip Balm
items.description: Lip balm/chapstick.
items.notes: As needed.

items.name: Knife or Multi-Tool
items.description: Only one or the other. Folding blade 4 inches or less.
items.notes: Knife OR multi-tool — not both. Folding blade 4 inches or less.
items.selectionTips: Only one item — either a knife or a multi-tool.

items.name: Sunscreen, Non-Aerosol
items.description: Non-aerosol sunscreen.
items.notes: Non-aerosol only.

items.name: Waterproof Bags (Zip Lock)
items.description: Zip lock bags. No larger than gallon-size.
items.notes: No larger than gallon-size. 1 box.
items.whyNeeded: Keeps documents and sensitive items dry.

items.name: Baby Wipes (Alcohol Free)
items.description: Alcohol free and without additives.
items.notes: Alcohol free and without additives. As needed.
items.whyNeeded: Field hygiene when shower access is limited.

items.name: Hand Sanitizer
items.description: Standard hand sanitizer.

items.name: Insect Repellant, Non-Aerosol
items.description: Non-aerosol insect repellant.
items.notes: Non-aerosol only. As needed.
items.whyNeeded: Camp Mackall area has heavy insect activity.

items.name: Boot Insoles
items.description: Replacement insoles for boots. Any type.
items.notes: Any type. As needed.
items.whyNeeded: Reduces foot fatigue and blisters during extended movement.

items.name: Lighter
items.description: Standard disposable lighter.

items.name: Liner, Field Jacket
items.description: Field jacket liner.

items.name: Map Case (Highly Recommended)
items.description: Clear map case. Highly recommended.
items.notes: Highly recommended.
items.whyNeeded: Protects maps during land navigation events — a heavily used piece of kit at SFPC.
items.selectionTips: Highly recommended. SFPC has extensive land navigation training.

items.name: Moleskin
items.description: Moleskin padding for blister prevention.
items.notes: As needed.
items.whyNeeded: Applied to hot spots before blisters form during ruck marches.

items.name: Q-Tips
items.description: Cotton swabs.
items.notes: As needed.

items.name: Skin Care Lotion (Small)
items.description: Small bottle of skin care lotion.

items.name: 100 MPH Tape
items.description: Tan or OD Green 100 MPH tape.
items.notes: Tan or OD Green only. 2 rolls.
items.whyNeeded: General field repair and gear reinforcement.

items.name: 550 Paracord
items.description: Nylon 550-type cord, military or subdued colors. 100 feet.
items.notes: Military or subdued colors only. 100 feet.

items.name: Extra Bite Valve & Bladder for Hydration System
items.description: Spare bite valve and bladder for CamelBak.
items.whyNeeded: Bite valves can fail. A spare prevents dehydration during critical events.

items.name: Bootlaces
items.description: Spare combat boot laces.
items.notes: 2 pairs.

items.name: Book
items.description: Bible, Ranger Handbook, or novel. No magazines.
items.notes: Bible, Ranger Handbook, or novel ONLY. No magazines.

items.name: Clothes Pins
items.description: Clothes pins for drying gear.
items.notes: As needed.

items.name: Physical Therapy Item (Non-Electric)
items.description: Foam roller or rolling stick. Non-electric only. One item maximum.
items.notes: Non-electric only. 1 item maximum.
items.whyNeeded: Recovery tool for muscle soreness during training.

items.name: Safety Pins
items.description: Standard safety pins.
items.notes: As needed.

items.name: Combination Lock
items.description: Combination lock. No key locks.
items.notes: NO KEY LOCKS. Combination only.

items.name: Anti-Chafe (Body Glide or Vaseline)
items.description: Anti-chafing product such as Body Glide or Vaseline.
items.whyNeeded: Prevents chafing and skin breakdown during ruck marches and PT.

items.name: Highlighters
items.description: Highlighter markers.
items.notes: As needed.

items.name: Bungee Cords (Tactical Colors Only)
items.description: Bungee cords in tactical/subdued colors only.
items.notes: Tactical colors only. As needed.

items.name: 2-Quart Canteen Straws
items.description: Drinking straws for 2-quart canteen.
items.notes: As needed.

items.name: Scrub Brush (to Clean TA-50)
items.description: Scrub brush for cleaning TA-50 equipment.
items.whyNeeded: TA-50 must be clean and serviceable.

items.name: Tent Stakes, Camping (Black — Spray Painted)
items.description: Camping tent stakes, spray painted black only. All other colors are unauthorized.
items.notes: Spray painted black only. All other colors are unauthorized. As needed.
items.selectionTips: Spray paint them black before arrival. Other colors are unauthorized.

items.name: Bed Sheets / Pillow
items.description: Bed sheets and pillow. No civilian sleeping bags. There are NO sheets in the barracks — bring your own.
items.notes: NO CIVILIAN SLEEPING BAGS. 1 set. IMPORTANT: There are no sheets in the barracks. If you do not bring your own, you will not have any.
items.whyNeeded: There are no sheets in the barracks at Camp Mackall.
items.selectionTips: Don't skip this. No sheets are provided in the barracks.

items.name: Facemask / Balaclava (Army Issue)
items.description: Army issue facemask or balaclava.
items.notes: Army Issue only.
items.whyNeeded: Cold weather face protection.

items.name: Neck Gaiter
items.description: Neck gaiter for cold weather.

items.name: Pace Cord (Ranger Beads)
items.description: 100-meter pace count cord (ranger beads).
items.whyNeeded: Highly useful for land navigation — a core SFPC skill.

items.name: Undergarment, BRA — No Underwire (Female Candidates)
items.description: Sports or training bra with no underwire, no clasps, no hooks. FEMALE CANDIDATES ONLY. Mandatory for female candidates.
items.notes: FEMALE CANDIDATES ONLY. MANDATORY — as needed. No underwire, No clasps, No Hooks.

items.name: Drawers, Cotton — No Spandex (Female Candidates)
items.description: Cotton underwear. No spandex or compression style. FEMALE CANDIDATES ONLY. Mandatory for female candidates.
items.notes: FEMALE CANDIDATES ONLY. MANDATORY — as needed. No Spandex or compression style.

items.name: Pads / Tampons (Female Candidates)
items.description: One month supply. FEMALE CANDIDATES ONLY. Mandatory for female candidates.
items.notes: FEMALE CANDIDATES ONLY. MANDATORY — 1 Month Supply.

items.name: Female Urinary Diversion Device / FUDD (Female Candidates)
items.description: Female urinary diversion device. FEMALE CANDIDATES ONLY. Mandatory for female candidates.
items.notes: FEMALE CANDIDATES ONLY. MANDATORY.

items.name: Cellular Phone / Electronic Items
items.description: Cell phones and all electronic items will be turned in and locked up during initial layout.
items.notes: Turned in and locked up during the initial layout.

items.name: Any Product Containing Caffeine
items.description: Caffeine products of any kind are prohibited.

items.name: Tobacco Products
items.description: Tobacco products of any type are prohibited.

items.name: Civilian Long Underwear
items.description: Only military issue cold weather base layers are authorized.
items.notes: Military issue Poly-Pro or Gen III only.

items.name: Contact Lenses
items.description: Contact lenses are prohibited.

items.name: Modified Shoulder Straps or Kidney Pads
items.description: Non-standard or modified rucksack shoulder straps and kidney pads are prohibited.

items.name: Spandex / Athletic Wear / Tight Fitting Under Armour
items.description: Spandex, athletic wear, and tight fitting undergarments are prohibited.
items.notes: Includes compression shorts, tight fitting Under Armour, and spandex of any kind.

items.name: Supplements, Vitamins, or Energy Products
items.description: All supplements, vitamins, and energy products are prohibited EXCEPT 100% whey protein powder (which is mandatory).
items.notes: EXCEPTION: 100% Whey Protein Powder is MANDATORY — it must say 'Nutrition Facts' and be factory sealed. All other supplements are prohibited.

items.name: GORE-TEX or Temperate Weather Boots and Socks
items.description: GORE-TEX boots, temperate weather boots, and GORE-TEX socks are prohibited.

items.name: Civilian Medications (Aspirin, Tylenol, etc.)
items.description: Over-the-counter civilian medications are prohibited.
items.notes: Includes aspirin, Tylenol, ibuprofen, and similar OTC medications.

items.name: Modified or Non-Standard TA-50
items.description: Only approved TA-50 items from the authorized list are permitted.
items.notes: See approved TA-50 list. FLC must be CIF issue — no aftermarket FLCs.

items.name: Kinesiology Tape
items.description: Kinesiology tape (e.g., KT Tape) is prohibited.

items.name: Medical Tape, Band Aids, Wraps, or Braces
items.description: Medical tape, bandages, wraps, and braces of any kind are prohibited.

items.name: Chem Lights, Glint/Reflective Tape, PT Belts
items.description: Chemical lights, glint tape, reflective tape, and PT belts are prohibited.

items.name: Personal Land Navigation Items, Tools, or Notes
items.description: Personal land navigation equipment, tools, and pre-written navigation notes are prohibited.
items.notes: Notebooks must be sterile (blank) upon arrival. Unauthorized items will be confiscated and student may be released from course.

items.name: Antiperspirant
items.description: Antiperspirant is prohibited. Deodorant only — deodorant/antiperspirant combo products are not authorized.
items.notes: Deodorant only. Cannot be antiperspirant or deodorant/antiperspirant combo.
